title: Nuage Micellar Cleansing Water with Vitamin C | Gently Removes Makeup, Cleanses & Hydrates Skin – Brightening Antioxidant Formula with Aloe Vera & Vitamin E | Suitable for All Skin Types (200ml)

features: BRIGHTENING WITH VITAMIN C: Infused with antioxidant-rich vitamin C, these micellar water cleansers help brighten dull skin while sweeping away impurities. Ideal for tired or uneven skin, especially after long days or late nights.

GENTLE YET EFFECTIVE CLEANSING: These micellar cleansers gently remove up to 100% of makeup without harsh rubbing. Perfect after a long workday or night out, they dissolve even waterproof mascara with ease.

ALOE VERA & VITAMIN E: With soothing aloe vera and skin-softening vitamin E, these cleansers hydrate as they clean. Use morning or night to keep skin soft, balanced and nourished—even during colder months.

NO-RINSE SIMPLE FACE WASH: These work as a simple face wash with no rinsing needed. Ideal for mornings on the go, post-workout freshening or when water isn’t easily available—like on a long-haul flight.

SUITABLE FOR ALL SKIN TYPES: Whether your skin is oily, dry, sensitive or combination, these micellar water cleansers are formulated to work gently with all skin types. Great for teenagers and adults alike.

VERSATILE DAILY CLEANSER: These are more than just makeup removers—they’re everyday skincare staples. Use them to prep skin before applying serums, or as the first step in a relaxing evening beauty ritual.
description: Product Description Experience radiant, refreshed skin with Nuage Micellar Cleansing Water – a gentle yet powerful cleanser enriched with vitamin C, aloe vera, and vitamin E. Designed to lift away dirt, impurities, and make-up without the need to rinse, this multi-tasking skincare essential soothes and hydrates while helping to brighten and tone the skin. Perfect as a simple face wash or as part of a full beauty routine, this micellar water delivers effective results in just a few swipes, leaving skin clean, calm, and visibly refreshed. Whether you're removing stubborn mascara, wiping away daily grime, or freshening up on the go, this cleanser is a must-have in any skincare kit. Kind to all skin types and sized perfectly for travel, it's an ideal addition to everyday routines and holiday essentials for women who want effortless, effective cleansing at their fingertips. Ingredients Aqua, Phenoxyethanol, Glycerine, Polysorbate-20, Sodium Cocoamphoacetate, Panthenol, Propylene Glycol, 3-O-Ethyl Ascorbic Acid (Vitamin C), Tetrasodium EDTA, Caprylyl Glycol, Citric Acid, Aloe Barbadensis (Aloe Vera) Leaf Extract, Tocopherol (Vitamin E) Acetate, Parfum, Anthemis Nobilis (Chamomile) Flower Extract, Benzoic Acid, Dehydroacetic Acid, Benzyl Salicylate, Linalool, Limonene, Hydroxycitronellal. Directions Apply the cleansing water to a cotton pad and sweep across your face, paying special attention to the eye and lip area if you are removing make-up. No need to rinse. Safety Warning Keep out of reach of children. For extrenal use only. Avoid contact with eyes. If irritation occurs, discontinue use. If product gets into eyes, rinse thoroughly with clean water. See more
